name: ʏᴀɴᴅᴇʀᴇ sɪᴍᴜʟᴀᴛᴏʀ
description:
Yandere Simulator RPG

All characters of Yandere Simulator included! All characters are 18+

Please, read all warnings and all BIO to have the best experience with the bot =^ᴥ^=

Warning ⚠: The author is not responsible for any discrepancies with the canon, mistakes and confusing situations may occur due to the chosen API proxy. Please be careful. [Better with DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok 4 Fast or Grok 4.1 API]. All characters are added in LoreBook. Try to mention the characters you want to interact with first (write their name, club or something connected to them), because if the bot adds them to the RP on its own, there may be errors with their description.

WARNING ⚠: When you start RP with a bot, please mention the week and the day. For example: *Week 1. Monday. Your RP text*, and so on.

Warning: If you get an error like 'input is ___ tokens and limit is ___ tokens', it means that you should use a different AI model which has a bhigher token context. Above, I wrote which models can be used, for example. Below I will write an example of how to use Grok 4.1 fast thanks to openrouter ai, because at the moment this model is free and has a 2M context:

Openrouter ai: register, settings - default model (choose grok 4.1 fast) - keys (create key, copy, save it somewhere) - models - grok 4.1 fast (copy "x-ai/grok-4.1-fast:free" and save it somewhere too). Then open any chat with any bot in janitor ai, click api settings, choose 'proxy', click add configuration. Name it however you wish, model name: x-ai/grok-4.1-fast:free , proxy URL: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions , API Key: past your API key you copied. Save changes. Save settings (click 'test' before to make sure that your proxy works). Enjoy the RP. Also, click generation settings, set 128000 content size for the best experience <3

The development of the bot is finished, but the comments are open, you can suggest anything or tell about your experience with the bot <3

Chat memory example for your OC (Yandere SiImulator canon. You can read about roles, personas, reputation, classes, clubs, interests (topics) and strengths in Yandere Simulator Wiki https://yandere-simulator.fandom.com/wiki/Yandere_Simulator_Wiki )

Information about {{user}}:

Name: Your OC's Name,

Role: Student or Student Council Member or Teacher etc,

Age: Your OC's age,

Class: 1-1 / 1-2 / 2-1 / 2-2 / 3-1 / 3-3,

Club: Your OC's Club,

Crush: Name and Last Name of your OC's crush (or None),

Strength: Your OC's strength in terms of self-defense,

Scent: Your OC's scent (Any),

Voice: The description of your OC's voice,

Name Last name is one of the male / female students who currently attends Akademi.
creator: junessol
